subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-06-07 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Be thou assured that certain colors exist which gladden the heart and conduce to the elevation of feelings; as, for example, the hue of green which bringeth tranquility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: معلوم است بعضی الوان هستند که مفرح قلب است و سبب ترقی احساسات،  مثلاً رنگ سبز سبب سکون
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the mind's power of discovery, @power of imagination; thought; right intention, @symbolism of color and light
